name: Magic of Runes: Hidden Object Game
short_description: Step into the enchanting realm of Enchanted Crossroads, a fantasy town bustling with a myriad of captivating creatures and hidden artifacts to be unraveled.
detailed_description:
Step into Enchanted Crossroads – A Hidden Object Fantasy Adventure

Welcome to Enchanted Crossroads, a magical town brimming with curious creatures, hidden treasures, and secrets just waiting to be uncovered. Join Detective Greystone on exciting missions as you hunt for clues, solve clever puzzles, and reveal the mysteries of a world touched by enchantment.

Wander through beautifully crafted scenes, each rich in detail and filled with surprises. Every corner holds something to discover, from hidden objects to subtle differences, offering a relaxing and rewarding gameplay experience that blends puzzle-solving with stunning visuals.

Key Features

Fun Variety of Tasks
Search for hidden objects, spot the differences, and take on a range of clever puzzles.

Build Your Collection
Complete quests, unlock special rewards, and expand your trove of magical items.

A Mystery to Unravel
Follow a captivating story filled with colorful characters and unexpected twists.

Play Your Way
Explore at your own pace and use helpful hints whenever you need them.

A Growing World
Meet new allies and uncover fresh chapters in the expanding realm of the Magic of Runes.

Adventure, mystery, and magic await in Enchanted Crossroads. Are you ready to begin the search?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Ukrainian, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America
